top_videos.text:
Yoga Flow Studio 🧘🏼‍♀️
@yoga_flow is a woman-owned, vinyasa-based yoga studio in Pittsburgh that’s teaching the importance of the breath when creating a stronger mind, body, and spirit.
top_videos.author: wqedpgh
